title: Customize Existing Action
overview: Modify an existing out-of-box action to add custom behavior or logic.
example: Customizing Select Customer Action for Create Order

steps.title: Copy OOB Code to src-custom Folder
steps.description: Copy the action service file from the shared library to your custom folder:

steps.title: Update app-customization.impl.ts
Apply Customizations
steps.description: Implement your custom logic in ExtnSelectCustomerActionService.

keyPoints: Always prefix custom files with extn-
Update class names to match the new file name
